summary: v3.0 backend + frontend tested. Backend: 19/22 hard-passed (1 skipped + 2 transient failures both Gemini rate-limit-related, verified working with direct curl after waiting). Frontend: all 12 routes load HTTP 200 with no JS errors; UI flows tested for long-memory CRUD, settings personality switch, skills telemetry cards, google hub.

minor.issue: Hits Gemini 2.5 Flash free-tier rate limit (5 RPM) when called in rapid succession. Test suite saw 2 failures (test_create_natural and test_intent_fallback_route). Individual curl AFTER waiting confirmed both work: natural reminder returned correct {text:'tomar agua', when:'2026-03-07T10:00...'}. No code bug — pure quota constraint. Optional improvement: smart_extract swallows ALL exceptions (returns {}), so quota errors look identical to 'phrase not parseable'. Could surface specific 429 error to caller.

issues: Visually polished and clear — CPU/RAM/DISCO/CLIMA SP cards populate with real telemetry. No issues.

action_items: OPTIONAL: In /app/mavis/core/brain.py:smart_extract, catch json.JSONDecodeError separately from generic Exception so Gemini 429/quota errors propagate to /api/reminders/natural & /api/chat (currently both look like 'phrase not parseable'). Could log/return a hint like 'IA ocupada, tente em 10s' when 429.
OPTIONAL: Add request-side throttling/retry-with-backoff for Gemini calls (the API responds with retryDelay).
No blocking action items — both v3.0 backend and frontend are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown — consider splitting endpoints by domain (long_memory, reminders, google, vision, system) into APIRouter files to keep under 700 lines per module.
smart_extract uses bare `except Exception: return {}` — masks real errors (quota, JSON parse, network). Should at minimum log to backend logs.
All new pages use data-testid attributes correctly. Good testability.
/api/google/calendar/today raises HTTPException 400 cleanly when credenciais.json missing — good UX for frontend.
No mongo _id leak found. Files persisted as JSON (long_memory.json, lembretes.json) on disk — fine for single-user desktop app, but consider mongo migration if multi-user is ever needed.

success_rate.backend: 86% (19/22 hard pass; remaining 3 are 1 expected skip + 2 quota-related, confirmed functional via direct curl)

seed_data_creation: All test data prefixed TESTE_PYTEST/TESTE_UI and removed at end of each test. Verified user's real data preserved: long_memory.json still has 1 real fact (Júlio Cesar), banco_de_dados.json with 267 rotas intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3.0 is fully functional. New file /app/backend/tests/test_v3_mavis.py is the regression suite. Be aware: Gemini 2.5 Flash free tier = 5 RPM; the suite makes ~7 LLM calls (1 vision, 1 natural reminder, 4 chat-intent). Running it twice in <60s WILL hit rate limit on chat tests. If reruns are needed, add `time.sleep(15)` between Gemini-heavy tests or use pytest -k to target subset.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA of the 2 transient failures: Gemini API free tier quota (5 requests/minute, error code 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED). The test suite executes vision_analyze + natural_reminder + 4 chat intents in <30s, exceeding 5 RPM. Reproduction: run pytest 2x consecutively. Mitigation (already validated): wait 60s, retry, confirms 200 OK. NOT a code bug. Optional code hardening listed in action_items.
